zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham是Sir James Echyngham和Joan Dakeney的兒子，於大約1334年出生在英國素可。他於大約1352年與Elizabeth Criol在英國素可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年1月18日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國素可艾欽加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham是Sir James Echyngham和Joan Dakeney的儿子，于大约1334年出生在英国素可。他于大约1352年与Elizabeth Criol在英国素可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年1月18日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国素可艾欽加姆。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham was born about 1334, in Sussex, England as the son of Sir James Echyngham and Joan Dakeney. He married Elizabeth Criol about 1352, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 January 1388, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Etchingham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham est né environ 1334, à Sussex, Angleterre, fils de Sir James Echyngham et Joan Dakeney. Il a épousé Elizabeth Criol environ 1352, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham wurde um 1334 in Sussex, England, als Sohn von Sir James Echyngham und Joan Dakeney geboren. Er hat um 1352 in Sussex, England Elizabeth Criol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1388 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Etchingham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham è nato il circa 1334 nel Sussex, England come figlio di Sir James Echyngham e Joan Dakeney. Lui sposato Elizabeth Criol circa 1352, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1388, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Etchingham, Sussex, England.

ja.Of, Echingham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Echynghamは約1334年にイギリススセックスでSir James EchynghamとJoan Dakeneyの息子として生まれた。約1352年にイギリススセックスでElizabeth Criolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年1月18日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススセックスエトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham(은)는 대략 1334년 영국 수세스에서 Sir James Echyngham(와)과 Joan Dakeney의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1352년 영국 수세스에서 Elizabeth Criol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 1월 18일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 트친그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Sussex, Inglaterra filho de Sir James Echyngham e Joan Dakeney. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Criol aproximadamente 1352, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1388, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham родился около 1334 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir James Echyngham и Joan Dakeney. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Criol около 1352 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 января 1388 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Echyngham nació aproximadamente 1334, en Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir James Echyngham y Joan Dakeney. Se casó con Elizabeth Criol aproximadamente 1352, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1388, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
